fields.name: Description
fields.default:
In a world of mass-produced jewelry, Allison transforms what others discard into something extraordinary. Recycled metals from her father's job site. Thrifted treasures given new purpose. Wire shaped by hand into wearable art.

Every material has a past — and in Allison's hands, a luminous future. Stones are sourced from a team of sisters in the mountains, and metals come from trusted US companies committed to sustainable practices.

default.title: Recycled Metals
default.description: Salvaged from construction sites and refined with care — each piece begins its second life in our workshop.

default.title: Mountain Stones
default.description: Ethically sourced by a family of sisters who know every trail and stream where these gems are found.

default.title: Made by Hand
default.description: Wire to jewelry, start to finish. No factory lines — just patient hands, simple tools, and deep intention.
